query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "wan-streamer v0.1: end-to-end real-time interactive foundation models" computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on real-time sensor data analytics in industrial cyber-physical systems (mining and bulk materials handling), which is an entirely different domain from the user's question about extending a real-time interactive Large Language Model (LLM) framework. While both mention "real-time" and "data," the constructs (physical sensor fusion vs. foundation model inference) and mechanisms are distinct, failing the "off-domain entirely" rejection rule.
